text: I feel enveloped in a liminal space, somewhere between the quiet sterility of modern architecture and the vibrant promise of innovation. The glass-walled conference room is stark and uninhabited, inviting both contemplation and a sense of voyeuristic observation. Venturing into the R+D area, I am met with an atmosphere of curiosity and experimental energy; words and visuals swirl together, blurring the boundary between discovery and confusion. My presence here lends a strange comfort—I am both participant and observer, surrounded by the artifacts of inquiry and the soft hum of possibility.
